description: List recent messages in a Slack channel via conversations.history. Use channel_id from slack_list_channels or slack_find_channel_by_name. Pagination: pass cursor from response_metadata.next_cursor.

channel_id.description: Slack channel ID (e.g. C12345 or G123 for private channels), not the human-readable name.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from response_metadata.next_cursor on the prior response.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (subject to Slack’s API limits).
